---
title: "DERRE · ODS 14 · Vida Submarina"
author: "DERRE"
date: today
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    toc: false
    theme: none
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* ============================================
     RESET & ROOT VARIABLES
  ============================================ */
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --abyss:      #020b18;
    --deep:       #041e35;
    --midnight:   #063052;
    --ocean:      #0a4f7e;
    --wave:       #1278b0;
    --reef:       #1ba3c6;
    --foam:       #5dd6f0;
    --biolum:     #00ffe7;
    --biolum2:    #00d4c8;
    --pearl:      #e8f4f8;
    --text-main:  #cce8f4;
    --text-muted: #7ab4cc;
    --glass-bg:   rgba(10, 79, 126, 0.18);
    --glass-border: rgba(93, 214, 240, 0.2);
    --glass-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    --ff-display: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
    --ff-body:    'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    --ff-mono:    'Space Mono', monospace;
  }

  /* ============================================
     GLOBAL BASE
  ============================================ */
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body, .quarto-container, #quarto-content, main {
    background: transparent !important;
    font-family: var(--ff-body);
    color: var(--text-main);
    min-height: 100vh;
  }

  /* Override Quarto layout padding */
  #quarto-content { padding: 0 !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
  .page-layout-full { padding: 0 !important; }
  
  /* Remove default title block */
  #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
  h1.title, p.author, p.date { display: none !important; }

  /* ============================================
     ANIMATED OCEAN BACKGROUND
  ============================================ */
  body {
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 10%, rgba(0, 255, 231, 0.06) 0%, transparent 50%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 90%, rgba(18, 120, 176, 0.15) 0%, transparent 50%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(6, 48, 82, 0.5) 0%, transparent 70%),
      linear-gradient(170deg, var(--abyss) 0%, var(--deep) 40%, var(--midnight) 70%, #041529 100%) !important;
    background-attachment: fixed !important;
  }

  /* Particle canvas */
  #ocean-canvas {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
    opacity: 0.4;
  }

  /* ============================================
     MAIN WRAPPER
  ============================================ */
  .ocean-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 2rem 6rem;
  }

  /* ============================================
     HERO SECTION
  ============================================ */
  .hero-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 6rem 2rem 4rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 100px;
    padding: 0.4rem 1.2rem;
    font-family: var(--ff-mono);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    color: var(--foam);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    animation: fadeInDown 0.8s ease both;
  }

  .hero-badge i { color: var(--biolum); font-size: 0.8rem; }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family: var(--ff-mono);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    color: var(--reef);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    animation: fadeInDown 0.9s ease both;
    animation-delay: 0.1s;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: var(--ff-display);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 4.2rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.1;
    color: var(--pearl);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    animation: fadeInDown 1s ease both;
    animation-delay: 0.15s;
  }

  .hero-title em {
    font-style: italic;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--foam), var(--biolum));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    max-width: 640px;
    margin: 0 auto 3rem;
    line-height: 1.7;
    animation: fadeInDown 1s ease both;
    animation-delay: 0.25s;
  }

  .hero-divider {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--biolum), transparent);
    margin: 0 auto 3rem;
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease both;
    animation-delay: 0.4s;
  }

  /* Wave decoration */
  .hero-wave {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 60px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-wave svg {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    fill: rgba(93, 214, 240, 0.06);
  }

  /* ============================================
     SECTION LABELS
  ============================================ */
  .section-label {
    font-family: var(--ff-mono);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    color: var(--reef);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.6rem;
  }

  .section-label::after {
    content: '';
    flex: 1;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--glass-border), transparent);
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--ff-display);
    font-size: 1.7rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--pearl);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .section-desc {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ============================================
     GLASSMORPHISM CARDS
  ============================================ */
  .glass-card {
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 20px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    box-shadow: var(--glass-shadow);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .glass-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(93,214,240,0.4), transparent);
  }

  .glass-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 40px rgba(0,255,231,0.06);
    border-color: rgba(93, 214, 240, 0.4);
  }

  /* ============================================
     NAVIGATION CARDS GRID
  ============================================ */
  .nav-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.4rem;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  .nav-card {
    padding: 2rem 1.8rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: block;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .nav-card-icon {
    width: 52px;
    height: 52px;
    border-radius: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    position: relative;
  }

  .nav-card:nth-child(1) .nav-card-icon { background: rgba(27,163,198,0.2); color: var(--reef); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(27,163,198,0.2); }
  .nav-card:nth-child(2) .nav-card-icon { background: rgba(18,120,176,0.2); color: var(--wave); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(18,120,176,0.2); }
  .nav-card:nth-child(3) .nav-card-icon { background: rgba(0,255,231,0.1); color: var(--biolum); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,255,231,0.15); }
  .nav-card:nth-child(4) .nav-card-icon { background: rgba(93,214,240,0.15); color: var(--foam); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(93,214,240,0.15); }

  .nav-card-title {
    font-family: var(--ff-display);
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--pearl);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .nav-card-desc {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  }

  .nav-card-link {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    font-family: var(--ff-mono);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--foam);
    text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(93,214,240,0.3);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
    transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-card:hover .nav-card-link {
    color: var(--biolum);
    border-color: var(--biolum);
  }

  .nav-card-link i { font-size: 0.7rem; transition: transform 0.2s; }
  .nav-card:hover .nav-card-link i { transform: translateX(4px); }

  /* ============================================
     INSIGHT BANNER
  ============================================ */
  .insight-banner {
    padding: 2.5rem 3rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,255,231,0.06) 0%, rgba(10,79,126,0.25) 100%);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,231,0.2);
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .insight-banner::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50%; right: -10%;
    width: 300px; height: 300px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,255,231,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .insight-icon-wrap {
    width: 64px;
    height: 64px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(0,255,231,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,231,0.3);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    color: var(--biolum);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,255,231,0.15);
  }

  .insight-label {
    font-family: var(--ff-mono);
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    color: var(--biolum2);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .insight-text {
    font-family: var(--ff-display);
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--pearl);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ============================================
     FOOTER
  ============================================ */
  .ocean-footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 3rem 0 2rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }

  .footer-ods-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.8rem;
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 100px;
    padding: 0.6rem 1.6rem;
    font-family: var(--ff-mono);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .footer-ods-badge span { color: var(--foam); font-weight: 700; }

  .footer-credit {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: rgba(123, 180, 204, 0.5);
  }

  /* ============================================
     STATS ROW
  ============================================ */
  .stats-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  .stat-card {
    padding: 1.8rem 1.5rem;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .stat-value {
    font-family: var(--ff-display);
    font-size: 2.4rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }

  .stat-card:nth-child(1) .stat-value { color: var(--foam); }
  .stat-card:nth-child(2) .stat-value { color: var(--biolum); }
  .stat-card:nth-child(3) .stat-value { color: var(--reef); }

  .stat-label {
    font-family: var(--ff-mono);
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .stat-unit {
    font-family: var(--ff-mono);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-left: 0.2rem;
  }

  /* ============================================
     ANIMATIONS
  ============================================ */
  @keyframes fadeInDown {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; }
    to   { opacity: 1; }
  }

  @keyframes float {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
    50%       { transform: translateY(-8px); }
  }

  @keyframes pulse-glow {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,255,231,0.15); }
    50%       { box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(0,255,231,0.3); }
  }

  .insight-icon-wrap { animation: pulse-glow 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

  /* Stagger animation for cards */
  .nav-card:nth-child(1) { animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease both; animation-delay: 0.1s; }
  .nav-card:nth-child(2) { animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease both; animation-delay: 0.2s; }
  .nav-card:nth-child(3) { animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease both; animation-delay: 0.3s; }
  .nav-card:nth-child(4) { animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease both; animation-delay: 0.4s; }

  .stat-card:nth-child(1) { animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease both; animation-delay: 0.15s; }
  .stat-card:nth-child(2) { animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease both; animation-delay: 0.25s; }
  .stat-card:nth-child(3) { animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease both; animation-delay: 0.35s; }

  /* ============================================
     RESPONSIVE
  ============================================ */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .ocean-wrapper { padding: 0 1rem 4rem; }
    .hero-section  { padding: 4rem 1rem 3rem; }
    .stats-row     { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .insight-banner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: center; padding: 1.8rem; }
    .insight-icon-wrap { margin: 0 auto; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 500px) {
    .nav-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-title { font-size: 2rem; }
  }
</style>

<!-- Particle background canvas -->
<canvas id="ocean-canvas"></canvas>

<div class="ocean-wrapper">

  <!-- ═══ HERO ═══════════════════════════════════ -->
  <section class="hero-section">
    <div class="hero-badge">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-water"></i>
      DERRE · HackODS 2025
    </div>
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Objetivo de Desarrollo Sostenible · 14</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
      ¿Puede la <em>biodiversidad marina</em><br>recuperarse del crecimiento pesquero<br>en Baja California?
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">
      Un análisis de datos sobre la interacción entre ecosistemas oceánicos, 
      poblaciones de fauna y presión pesquera en el litoral bajacaliforniano.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-divider"></div>
  </section>

  <!-- ═══ STATS ROW ═══════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="stats-row">
    <div class="glass-card stat-card">
      <div class="stat-value">3.1M<span class="stat-unit">km²</span></div>
      <div class="stat-label"><i class="fa-solid fa-globe fa-xs"></i> &nbsp;Mar Territorial Mexicano</div>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-card stat-card">
      <div class="stat-value">~30%</div>
      <div class="stat-label"><i class="fa-solid fa-fish fa-xs"></i> &nbsp;Especies en Riesgo Global</div>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-card stat-card">
      <div class="stat-value">2030</div>
      <div class="stat-label"><i class="fa-solid fa-calendar fa-xs"></i> &nbsp;Meta Agenda ODS</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ═══ NAVIGATION SECTION ══════════════════════ -->
  <div class="section-label"><i class="fa-solid fa-compass"></i> Navegación del análisis</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Explora el estudio</h2>
  <p class="section-desc">
    Cuatro secciones interconectadas que van del contexto a la acción, 
    combinando exploración histórica con modelado predictivo.
  </p>

  <div class="nav-grid">

    <div class="glass-card nav-card">
      <div class="nav-card-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-book-open"></i></div>
      <div class="nav-card-title">Introducción</div>
      <div class="nav-card-desc">Contexto general del proyecto y la importancia ecológica y económica del área de estudio en Baja California.</div>
      <a class="nav-card-link" href="introduccion.qmd">Ir a Introducción <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card nav-card">
      <div class="nav-card-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i></div>
      <div class="nav-card-title">Análisis Exploratorio</div>
      <div class="nav-card-desc">Visualización de patrones históricos de ballenas, pelícanos y producción pesquera a lo largo del tiempo.</div>
      <a class="nav-card-link" href="analisis.qmd">Ir a Análisis <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card nav-card">
      <div class="nav-card-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-brain"></i></div>
      <div class="nav-card-title">Modelo Predictivo</div>
      <div class="nav-card-desc">Simulación de escenarios futuros basados en el modelo de Ricker, con parámetros ajustables.</div>
      <a class="nav-card-link" href="modelo.qmd">Ir a Modelo <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card nav-card">
      <div class="nav-card-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-binoculars"></i></div>
      <div class="nav-card-title">Escenarios a Futuro</div>
      <div class="nav-card-desc">Análisis de riesgos y recomendaciones estratégicas para la conservación marina sostenible.</div>
      <a class="nav-card-link" href="escenarios.qmd">Ir a Escenarios <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- ═══ INSIGHT BANNER ══════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="insight-banner">
    <div class="insight-icon-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-lightbulb"></i></div>
    <div>
      <div class="insight-label"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle fa-2xs"></i>&nbsp; Insight central del estudio</div>
      <p class="insight-text">
        "El sistema marino responde simultáneamente a presiones climáticas y humanas. 
        Entender esta interacción es clave para diseñar estrategias verdaderamente sostenibles."
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ═══ FOOTER ═══════════════════════════════════ -->
  <footer class="ocean-footer">
    <div class="footer-ods-badge">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-water"></i>
      <span>ODS 14</span> · Vida Submarina · Agenda 2030 para el Desarrollo Sostenible
    </div>
    <p class="footer-credit">Elaborado por DERRE · HackODS 2025</p>
  </footer>

</div>

<!-- Particle animation script -->
<script>
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('ocean-canvas');
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

  function resize() {
    canvas.width  = window.innerWidth;
    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  }
  resize();
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

  const particles = [];
  const count = 70;

  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    particles.push({
      x:     Math.random() * window.innerWidth,
      y:     Math.random() * window.innerHeight,
      r:     Math.random() * 1.8 + 0.4,
      vx:    (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3,
      vy:    -(Math.random() * 0.4 + 0.1),
      alpha: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.1,
      hue:   Math.random() > 0.5 ? '93, 214, 240' : '0, 255, 231',
    });
  }

  function draw() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    particles.forEach(p => {
      p.x  += p.vx;
      p.y  += p.vy;
      p.alpha += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.01;
      p.alpha  = Math.max(0.05, Math.min(0.6, p.alpha));

      if (p.y < -10) { p.y = canvas.height + 10; p.x = Math.random() * canvas.width; }
      if (p.x < -10 || p.x > canvas.width + 10) { p.x = Math.random() * canvas.width; }

      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${p.hue}, ${p.alpha})`;
      ctx.fill();
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(draw);
  }
  draw();
})();
</script>
```
